subject: science

primary.justification: The chapter's entire substance is the scientific method — observe, question, hypothesise, test, analyse — introduced through the relatable example of a pen that stops writing. All three student activities (1.1, 1.2, 1.3) directly practise question formulation and inquiry design. CG-6 is the appropriate CG because this is an orientation/epistemology chapter with no content-domain match in CG-1 through CG-5.

dissolution_test: This chapter builds the student's ability to formulate scientific questions and structure a process of inquiry by connecting the scientific method to familiar everyday problem-solving experiences.
